query:
SELECT tournamentId, phase, COUNT(*) as total FROM games GROUP BY tournamentId, phase;
SELECT id, teamAName, teamBName, matchDate, groupName FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 2 AND phase = 'group_stage' ORDER BY matchDate LIMIT 5;
